name: Lilhayat baqia
overview: The work deals with the story of the Salem and Fatima family, where the father works as a lawyer facing many challenges in his working life, while on the other side, Fatima tries to face the challenges and family troubles of the children, and with his death, Fatima is forced to work in the law office.

trailers.title: مسلسل للحياة بقية - الحلقة 1 بجودة عالية
